name: NumberTicker
description: Animated count-up from zero to target number.

api.name: NumberTicker
api.description: Animated count-up from zero to target number.

parameters.name: ThousandsSeparator
parameters.description: Thousands group separator. When null (the default) the separator is taken from CurrentCulture so the count-up matches the user's locale (e.g. 1.234 in de-DE). Set to an explicit string to override, or to empty string to suppress grouping.

examples.title: Basic Count-Up
examples.code:
<NumberTicker Value="1000" Class="text-4xl font-bold tabular-nums" />
<NumberTicker Value="99.9" Decimals="1" Class="text-4xl font-bold tabular-nums" />

examples.title: With Prefix and Suffix
examples.code:
<NumberTicker Value="48295" Prefix="$" Class="text-3xl font-semibold tabular-nums" />
<NumberTicker Value="94.7" Decimals="1" Suffix="%" Class="text-3xl font-semibold tabular-nums" />

examples.title: Custom Duration
examples.code:
<NumberTicker Value="250" DurationMs="500" Class="text-2xl font-bold" />
<NumberTicker Value="250" DurationMs="3000" Class="text-2xl font-bold" />

examples.title: Custom Separator & Currency
examples.code:
<NumberTicker Value="1500000" ThousandsSeparator="." DurationMs="2000" />
<NumberTicker Value="9876543" Prefix="$" ThousandsSeparator="," DurationMs="2000" />
<NumberTicker Value="99.9" Decimals="1" Suffix="%" />

mdSummary:
# NumberTicker

Animated count-up from zero to target number.

**Package:** `Lumeo.Motion` · **Category:** Motion
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/number-ticker

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| NumberTicker | Value | `double` | `` |  |
| NumberTicker | StartValue | `double` | `0` |  |
| NumberTicker | DurationMs | `int` | `1500` |  |
| NumberTicker | Decimals | `int` | `0` |  |
| NumberTicker | Prefix | `string?` | `` |  |
| NumberTicker | Suffix | `string?` | `` |  |
| NumberTicker | ThousandsSeparator | `string?` | `` | Thousands group separator. When null (the default) the separator is taken from CurrentCulture so the count-up matches the user's locale (e.g. 1.234 in de-DE). Set to an explicit string to override, or to empty string to suppress grouping. |
| NumberTicker | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| NumberTicker | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- (none)

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- `ComponentInteropService` ()

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<NumberTicker />
```

## CSS variables

## Files
